data.title: "Huawei Africa Night 2025 celebrates African intelligence pioneers at HUAWEI CONNECT 2025, with 500+ attendees."
data.description: Held in Shanghai on September 18 in conjunction with HUAWEI CONNECT 2025, the "Huawei Africa Night 2025" event brought together over 500 attendees including partners, government officials, experts, and industry leaders. The event centered around the theme "All Intelligence for New Africa" with a focus on discussing the latest developments in ICT (information and communications technology) innovation and collaboration. The goal was to drive forward the intelligent transformation of the continent. Shen Li, President of Huawei Northern Africa, was among the key participants.

data.title: Standard Chartered predicts Bitcoin may hit $135,000 soon as it bucks trend of price drop 18 months post-halving.
data.description: The Global Head of Digital Assets Research at a bank stated that Bitcoin is currently not following the typical trend of decreasing prices seen 18 months after a halving event.

data.title: New Microsoft Commercial Business CEO to focus on products as Nadella switches to AI, "founder mode." MSFT stock at NASDAQ: MSFT.
data.description: Judson Althoff has taken on the role of Microsoft Corp.'s commercial business chief as CEO Satya Nadella delegates some responsibilities. This move, according to Althoff, allows Nadella to shift his focus back to the development of artificial intelligence (AI) as he enters "founder mode." Althoff emphasized that this reorganization will enable Nadella to concentrate on the future of AI, encompassing architectures, platforms, strategies, and the broader industry impact of AI. While Nadella focuses on AI, Althoff will concentrate on executing the product strategy, roadmap, and engineering deliveries. The current price of MSFT stock can be checked. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rezolve Ai exceeds 2025 guidance with $150M ARR and sets 2026 target at $500M ARR, surpassing analyst forecasts.
data.description: Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV), a top player in AI-powered commerce solutions, revealed its first half 2025 results in New York on October 1. Partnered with Microsoft, Google, and Tether, the company exceeded analyst predictions, showcasing significant growth. This highlights Rezolve Ai's increasing traction with international corporations and its emergence as a key player in driving AI-driven commerce.

data.title: Wall Street shifts focus to IPO-ready crypto firms amid altcoin season, with increased capital inflow.
data.description: There has been a noticeable increase in Wall Street capital being invested in late-stage cryptocurrency firms that are preparing for initial public offerings (IPOs). This trend indicates a shift in dynamics for the upcoming altcoin season, with substantial financial backing from traditional financial institutions. Crypto companies on the cusp of going public are garnering significant attention and support from the Wall Street sector, suggesting a growing interest in digital assets among institutional investors. This influx of capital from traditional finance into the crypto space is poised to shape the landscape for upcoming altcoin developments, potentially driving new trends and opportunities within the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP prices hold strong. $900M ETF flows. Bitcoin $120,304, Ethereum $4,474, XRP $3.03. 147,934 traders liquidated, $401.39M lost. Spot BTC ETFs see $627.2M inflows, ETH ETFs $307.05M. Anticipated short-term upside in Bitcoin.
data.description: On Friday morning, Bitcoin's price remains above $120,000 amidst a U.S. government shutdown. The current cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $120,304.71, Ethereum at $4,474.50, Solana at $230.15, XRP at $3.03, Dogecoin at $0.2556, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001239. Recent data reveals that 147,934 traders were liquidated within the last 24 hours, amounting to $401.39 million in losses. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicates net inflows of $627.2 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs, with spot Ethereum ETFs seeing $307.05 million in net inflows on Friday. Altcoin Sherpa suggests that Bitcoin is displaying strength on lower timeframes, with traders expecting short-term gains. Analyst Michael van de Poppe highlights Bitcoin's clearance of key highs, leading to potential further advancements. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Micro-cap stocks are rallying due to falling interest rates and lower valuations. Despite risks, they outperform.
data.description: Lowest market-cap stocks, known as micro-cap stocks, are experiencing a surge in value due to declining interest rates and their relatively lower valuations. Despite associated risks, these companies are outperforming in the stock market.

data.title: Journaling boosts creativity and happiness by providing an outlet for self-expression and emotional exploration.
data.description: Maintaining a journal serves as a valuable tool for self-expression and can ignite creativity while enabling individuals to delve into their emotions through writing. Establishing a habit of journaling can contribute to increased happiness, according to an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Kura Oncology granted 122,250 stock options to 7 new employees under Nasdaq rule, as inducement.
data.description: On October 1, 2025, Kura Oncology, Inc. unveiled that the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors bestowed inducement awards to seven (7) new employees. The awards include nonstatutory stock options enabling the purchase of 122,250 shares of common stock. This initiative falls under the Company’s 2023 Inducement Option Plan, as amended. The stock options were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee as a crucial inducement for the new employees’ employment, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Kura Oncology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity dedicated to harnessing precision medicines for cancer treatment.

data.title: Almaden Minerals Ltd. appoints Douglas McDonald as President and CEO, with Morgan Poliquin as Vice Chair.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 3, 2025, Almaden Minerals Ltd. revealed the promotion of Douglas McDonald as the President and CEO of the Company. Almaden, listed on both TSX as AMM and OTCQB as AAUAF, also assigned Morgan Poliquin as the Vice Chair.

data.title: Almadex approved by TSXV for Option Agreement with Azucar Minerals Ltd., giving 60% interest in 3 claims in Nevada.
data.description: Almadex Minerals Ltd., a Canadian company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol "DEX," has disclosed that the TSX Venture Exchange has given the green light to the Company’s proposed Option-Joint venture exploration deal with Azucar Minerals Ltd. This agreement allows Azucar the opportunity to purchase a 60% stake in three of Almadex’s wholly owned claim blocks in Nevada - namely, the Pilot, Confusion Hills, and Red Ring prospect. The initial announcement regarding this partnership was made on May 1, 2025.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet to hold Q3 earnings webcast on Nov 5, 2025 at 8:30am ET. Stay tuned for results. #ZBH #NYSE #SIX
data.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc., headquartered in Warsaw, Indiana, disclosed that its third quarter earnings conference call will be broadcasted online on November 5, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company, listed on NYSE and SIX under the ticker symbol ZBH, informed that a comprehensive report on the quarterly financial results will be released concurrently.
Latest auction results for Treasury Bonds: RIKB 35 0917 at X% and RIKS 29 0917 at Y%. Interest rates slightly increased.

data.title: BriaCell to present preclinical Bria-OTS+ data at SITC 2025 with poster presentation on November 7-9 in National Harbor.
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq (BCTX, BCTXW, BCTXZ) and TSX (BCT), based in Philadelphia and Vancouver, will showcase preclinical Bria-OTS+ data at the Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC) 40th Anniversary Annual Meeting on November 7-9, 2025, in National Harbor, MD. This event marks a significant step in their mission to revolutionize cancer care through innovative immunotherapies.

data.title: Azucar Minerals Ltd. option agreement with Almadex approved by TSXV to acquire a 60% interest in three Nevada claims.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 3, 2025, Azucar Minerals Ltd. shared that the TSX Venture Exchange has given the green light to the Company’s Option-Joint venture exploration deal with Almadex Minerals Ltd. As per this agreement, Azucar has the opportunity to obtain a 60% stake in three of Almadex’s fully owned claim blocks in Nevada – namely, the Pilot, Confusion Hills, and Red Ring prospect. This collaboration was initially announced in a press release on May 1, 2025. Azucar is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the tickers TSX-V: AMZ and OTCQX: AXDDF.
